member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Collections.EquatableArray`1

summary.para: An immutable array with value equality by content and order, safe to retain in an incremental generator pipeline (unlike , whose equality is by reference).

A value and an empty array represent the same empty sequence: they compare equal and share the same hash code. Absence with domain meaning must be modelled explicitly outside the collection, not as versus empty.

member.typeparam: The element type, which must have value equality.

member.name: F:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Collections.EquatableArray`1.Empty
member.summary: The shared empty instance. Equivalent to .

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Collections.EquatableArray`1.#ctor(System.Collections.Immutable.ImmutableArray{`0})
member.summary: Creates an from an . A default or empty source becomes the empty sequence.
member.param: The items to copy into the immutable sequence.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Collections.EquatableArray`1.#ctor(`0[])
member.summary: Creates an from an array. A or empty source becomes the empty sequence.
member.param: The items to copy into the immutable sequence.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Collections.EquatableArray`1.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{`0})
member.summary: Creates an from a sequence. A or empty source becomes the empty sequence.
member.param: The items to copy into the immutable sequence.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Collections.EquatableArray`1.IsEmpty
member.summary: Whether this is the empty sequence.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Collections.EquatableArray`1.AsImmutableArray
member.summary: Returns the content as an (empty when this is the empty sequence).
member.returns: An immutable copy of the sequence.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Collections.EquatableArray`1.op_Equality(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Collections.EquatableArray{`0},RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Collections.EquatableArray{`0})
member.summary: Determines whether two arrays contain the same items in the same order.
member.param: The first array.
The second array.
member.returns: when both arrays have equal content and order.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Collections.EquatableArray`1.op_Inequality(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Collections.EquatableArray{`0},RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Collections.EquatableArray{`0})
member.summary: Determines whether two arrays differ by content or order.
member.param: The first array.
The second array.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Collections.EquatableArray
member.summary: Helpers to build values.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Collections.EquatableArray.ToEquatableArray``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Creates an by copying a sequence.
member.param: The source sequence; represents an empty sequence.
member.returns: An immutable sequence with value equality.

summary.para: Describes how to assign a property, as resolved during matching. Mutable, and part of a tree that holds Roslyn symbols (through ).

Do not retain it in an incremental generator pipeline, and do not use it as a cache key: it has no value equality. Convert the matching result with and feed the pipeline with the resulting snapshot instead.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Assignments.AssignDescriptor.Materialization
member.summary: How the enumerable expression must be materialized for the target property.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Assignments.AssignDescriptor.RequireToList
member.summary: Whether the enumerable expression requires .ToList().

summary.para: For , how each element of the enumerable must be assigned.

When the elements are objects to be mapped, this is a carrying the . When they only need a conversion (e.g. List<int> to List<long>), this is the conversion of the element (, ...) and there is no inner selection.

member.name: F:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Assignments.AssignType.Direct
member.summary: Direct assignment, no conversion needed.

member.name: F:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Assignments.AssignType.SimpleCast
member.summary: Simple cast, no conversion needed.

member.name: F:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Assignments.AssignType.NullableTernary
member.summary: Represents a nullable assignment performed using a ternary operator. This allows for conditional assignment based on the presence of a value.

member.name: F:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Assignments.AssignType.NullableTernaryCast
member.summary: Represents a nullable assignment performed using a ternary operator with a cast. This allows for conditional assignment based on the presence of a value.

member.name: F:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Assignments.AssignType.NewInstance
member.summary: It is required to create a new object for the target property type, mapping the properties between the two objects.

member.name: F:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Assignments.AssignType.Select
member.summary: It is required to apply the Select method to the target property type, to transform the elements accordingly.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Assignments.CollectionMaterialization
member.summary: How an enumerable expression must be materialized to be assignable to the target property.

member.name: F:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Assignments.CollectionMaterialization.None
member.summary: No materialization required: the target accepts the enumerable as is (e.g. IEnumerable<T>).

member.name: F:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Assignments.CollectionMaterialization.List
member.summary: Requires .ToList() (e.g. List<T>, IReadOnlyList<T>, ICollection<T>).

member.name: F:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Assignments.CollectionMaterialization.Array
member.summary: Requires .ToArray() (e.g. T[]).

member.name: F:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Assignments.CollectionMaterialization.HashSet
member.summary: Requires .ToHashSet() (e.g. HashSet<T>, ISet<T>).
Descobre qual materialização (ToList, ToArray, ToHashSet ou nenhuma) produz um valor assinável ao tipo de destino, testando a conversão implícita a partir do tipo concreto construído.

summary.para: Describes a property during matching and code generation.

It implements for the matching logic (comparing name and type, never the symbol), but it holds a and therefore must not be retained by an incremental generator pipeline. Use and pass the resulting symbol-free snapshot along instead.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.IPropertyNameResolver
member.summary: Resolves property names for given property symbols.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.IPropertyNameResolver.TryResolvePropertyName(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.IPropertySymbol,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to resolve the property name for the given property symbol.
member.param: The property symbol to resolve the name for.
The resolved property name, if successful; otherwise, null.
member.returns: True if the property name was successfully resolved; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.MatchOptions
member.summary: Provides configuration options for controlling how property values are retrieved and compared during a match operation.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.MatchOptions.InternalDefault
member.summary: Internal default instance of .

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.MatchOptions.Default
member.summary: Creates a new instance of with default settings.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.MatchOptions.GetOriginProperties(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.TypeDescriptor)
member.summary: Default method to retrieve properties from the origin type. Util when overriding the default retriever is not necessary.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.MatchOptions.GetTargetProperties(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.TypeDescriptor)
member.summary: Default method to retrieve properties from the target type. Util when overriding the default retriever is not necessary.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.MatchOptions.OriginPropertiesRetriever
member.summary: The retriever used to obtain properties from the origin type.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.MatchOptions.TargetPropertiesRetriever
member.summary: The retriever used to obtain properties from the target type.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.MatchOptions.PropertyNameResolvers
member.summary: Additional property name resolvers to be used during property matching.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.MatchOptions.AdditionalAssignDescriptorResolvers
member.summary:
Gets or sets the collection of additional assign descriptor resolvers to be used during assignment operations.
Optional; if not set, only the default resolvers will be used.
member.remarks: Use this property to specify custom resolvers that extend or override the default assignment behavior. The order of resolvers in the array may affect resolution precedence.

summary.para: The result of matching the properties of an origin type against a target type.

This is the working model of the matching: it holds Roslyn symbols (which would keep the whole alive) and mutable state, so it must not cross into an incremental generator pipeline, nor be used as a cache key — it has no value equality.
Use it while resolving the match, then convert it with . The resulting is immutable, symbol-free and has value equality, which is what the pipeline needs to cache and compare between builds:
summary.code: var snapshot = MatchSelectionSnapshotFactory.Create(matchSelection); // snapshot pode ser retornado de um provider e comparado entre builds

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.MatchTypeInfo
member.summary: Represent a type and its properties that can be matched to another type.
Creates a new instance of .
member.param: The type descriptor.
The properties of the type.
The match options used to retrieve the properties.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.MatchTypeInfo.#ctor(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.TypeDescriptor)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MatchTypeInfo class for the specified target type descriptor.
member.remarks: The constructed instance uses the default match options and retrieves the target type's properties using the default property retriever. This ensures consistent matching behavior across instances.
member.param: The type descriptor representing the target type for which matching information will be constructed. Cannot be null.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.MatchTypeInfo.#ctor(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.TypeDescriptor,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertyDescriptor})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MatchTypeInfo class with the specified type descriptor and property descriptors.
member.param: The type descriptor representing the type to be matched.
A read-only list of property descriptors that define the properties associated with the type.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.MatchTypeInfo.#ctor(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.TypeDescriptor,RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.MatchOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MatchTypeInfo class using the specified type descriptor and matching options.
member.param: The type descriptor representing the target type for which property matching information will be generated. Cannot be null.
The options that configure property matching behavior, including how target properties are retrieved. Cannot be null.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.MatchTypeInfo.Type
member.summary: The type descriptor of the current type.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.MatchTypeInfo.Properties
member.summary: The properties of the current type.

summary.para: A result of matching a property from the origin type to a property in the target type.

Holds Roslyn symbols and mutable state. Do not retain it in an incremental generator pipeline, and do not use it as a cache key: it has no value equality. Convert the matching result with and feed the pipeline with the resulting snapshot instead.
A result of matching a property from the origin type to a property in the target type.

Holds Roslyn symbols and mutable state. Do not retain it in an incremental generator pipeline, and do not use it as a cache key: it has no value equality. Convert the matching result with and feed the pipeline with the resulting snapshot instead.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.PropertyMatch.Origin
member.summary: The origin property type descriptor. (DTO property)

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.PropertyMatch.Target
member.summary: The target property selection. (Entity property)

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.PropertyMatch.AssignDescriptor
member.summary: The assign descriptor that describes how to assign the origin property to the target property.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.PropertyMatch.IsMissing
member.summary: Determines if the target property selection is missing.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.PropertyMatch.CanAssign
member.summary: Determine if the properties are compatible and has a valid assign descriptor.

summary.para: A property, or a path of properties, selected on the target type.

Holds Roslyn symbols, and its is assigned after construction (see ), so its state is not stable. Do not retain it in an incremental generator pipeline, and do not use it as a cache key: it has no value equality. Convert the matching result with and feed the pipeline with the resulting snapshot instead.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.PropertySelection.PropertyType
member.summary: The current selected property type.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.PropertySelection.RootDeclaringType
member.summary: The declaring class type of the root selected property. if this selection does not have a parent, this selection will be the root.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.PropertySelection.Parent
member.summary: The parent . Can be null.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.PropertySelection.WritePropertyPath(System.Text.StringBuilder)
member.summary: Writes the property path to a .

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.PropertySelection.FlattenedPropertyPath
member.summary: Returns a flattened string representation of the property path by concatenating the names of all properties in the path.
member.examples: Given a property path like "Address.Street.Name", this method will return "AddressStreetName".
member.returns: A that represents the flattened property path.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.PropertySelection.ToEnumerablePath
member.summary: Returns an enumerable sequence representing the path from the root to the current property selection.
member.remarks: The returned sequence includes all ancestor property selections, followed by the current instance. This can be used to traverse or analyze the full selection path in hierarchical scenarios.
member.returns: An containing each property selection in the path, ordered from the root to the current instance.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.ParameterSnapshot
member.summary: A symbol-free, value-equatable snapshot of a : the parameter name plus the type as used (structure + contextual roles) via .

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.ParameterSnapshot.#ctor(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeUsageSnapshot,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a parameter snapshot.
member.param: The frozen structural type and contextual roles.
The non-empty parameter name.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.ParameterSnapshot.TypeUsage
member.summary: The type of the parameter, with its contextual roles frozen.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.ParameterSnapshot.Name
member.summary: The parameter name.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.ParameterSnapshot.CreateFromHints(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.ParameterDescriptor)
member.summary: Creates a snapshot reading the descriptor's type hints into frozen roles.
member.param: The parameter descriptor to snapshot.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.ParameterSnapshot.Create(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.ParameterDescriptor,RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeUsageRoles)
member.summary: Creates a snapshot with explicit roles for the parameter's type.
member.param: The parameter descriptor to snapshot.
The contextual roles resolved for this parameter.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.ServiceTypeSnapshot
member.summary: A symbol-free, value-equatable snapshot of a (a DI registration pair). A service registration has no contextual role, so both members are structural s.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.ServiceTypeSnapshot.#ctor(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot,RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot)
member.summary: Creates a service registration snapshot.
member.param: The registered service type.
The service implementation type.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.ServiceTypeSnapshot.InterfaceType
member.summary: The service interface type.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.ServiceTypeSnapshot.HandlerType
member.summary: The service implementation (handler) type.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.ServiceTypeSnapshot.Create(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.ServiceTypeDescriptor)
member.summary: Creates a snapshot from a descriptor.
member.param: The service registration descriptor to snapshot.
member.returns: An immutable, symbol-free service registration snapshot.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.EditTypeSnapshot
member.summary: A symbol-free, value-equatable snapshot of an : the edited entity type, its id type, and the resolved entity parameter (when already bound during the transform).
Creates an edited-entity snapshot.
member.param: The entity type being edited.
The entity identifier type.
The bound handler parameter, when resolved.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.EditTypeSnapshot.EntityType
member.summary: The entity type being edited.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.EditTypeSnapshot.IdType
member.summary: The id type of the edited entity.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.EditTypeSnapshot.Parameter
member.summary: The command parameter that receives the loaded entity, when resolved.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.EditTypeSnapshot.Create(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.EditTypeDescriptor)
member.summary: Creates a snapshot from a descriptor, snapshotting its bound parameter when present.
member.param: The edited-entity descriptor to snapshot.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.IdPropertyBindingSnapshot
member.summary: A symbol-free, value-equatable snapshot of an : the binding between an entity (or collection-of-entities) parameter and the command property that carries its id(s).

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.IdPropertyBindingSnapshot.#ctor(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.ParameterSnapshot,RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.PropertySnapshot)
member.summary: Creates an entity-id binding snapshot.
member.param: The bound entity parameter.
The command property carrying the identifier.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.IdPropertyBindingSnapshot.Parameter
member.summary: The entity (or collection-of-entities) parameter.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.IdPropertyBindingSnapshot.Property
member.summary: The command property holding the id (or ids) used to load the entity.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.IdPropertyBindingSnapshot.Create(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.IdPropertyBoundToEntityParameter)
member.summary: Creates a snapshot from a descriptor.
member.param: The entity-id binding descriptor to snapshot.

summary.para: Creates immutable, symbol-free snapshots of property matching results for safe retention by incremental generator pipelines.

This is the boundary between the two models. and the descriptors it carries (, , AssignDescriptor) are the working model of the matching: they hold Roslyn symbols and mutable state, so retaining them in a pipeline keeps the whole Compilation alive and makes caching unreliable. The snapshots are the pipeline model: immutable, symbol-free, with value equality all the way down.
So resolve the match inside the transform, snapshot it, and let only the snapshot escape:

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.MatchSelectionSnapshotFactory.Create(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertySelection.MatchSelection)
member.summary: Creates the snapshot of a matching result, to be retained by an incremental generator pipeline.
member.param: The matching result, which holds symbols and must not escape the transform.
member.returns: An immutable, symbol-free snapshot with value equality.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot
member.summary: An immutable, symbol-free structural description of a type.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.Name
member.summary: The source-facing type name.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.Namespaces
member.summary: The namespaces required to reference the type.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.IsNullable
member.summary: Whether the descriptor represents a nullable type.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.IsNullableReference
member.summary: Whether the symbol is an annotated nullable reference type.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.IsNonNullableReference
member.summary: Whether the symbol is a non-nullable reference type.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.IsValueType
member.summary: Whether the type is a value type.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.IsNullableValueType
member.summary: Whether the type is a nullable value type.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.Declaration
member.summary: The named type declaration, when one was resolved.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.IsVoid
member.summary: Whether the type is void.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.IsNamedType
member.summary: Whether the type is a named type.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.IsArray
member.summary: Whether the type is an array (T[]).

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.ArrayRank
member.summary: The array rank, or zero when the type is not an array or its shape was not resolved semantically.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.ElementType
member.summary: For an array type, the snapshot of its element type; otherwise .

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.ContainingType
member.summary: The constructed containing type for a nested named type; otherwise . This preserves outer generic arguments, which are not included in the nested symbol's own .

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.TypeArguments
member.summary: The generic type arguments (empty when the type is not a constructed generic). Nested types are snapshotted recursively so the whole shape has value equality.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.OriginalDefinitionMetadataName
member.summary: The metadata name of the original (unbound) definition when the type is a named type (e.g. Task`1 for Task<T>), used to classify Task/ValueTask/Result and similar without depending on type arguments. for arrays, type parameters and symbol-less snapshots.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.OriginalDefinitionQualifiedMetadataName
member.summary: The namespace- and containing-type-qualified metadata identity of the original named definition (e.g. System.Threading.Tasks.Task`1). Consumers should use this value when classifying known types.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.HasCompleteShape
member.summary: Whether all structural facts required for semantic classification were available. Symbol-less descriptors are deliberately marked incomplete instead of having their display names parsed heuristically.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.MetadataName
member.summary: The metadata name of the type (e.g. List`1), falling back to when there is no named declaration. It is derived from other fields, so it is not part of equality.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.MayBeNull
member.summary: Whether values of the type may be null.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.UnderlyingType
member.summary: The source-facing type name without a trailing nullable marker.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot.Create(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.TypeDescriptor)
member.summary: Creates an immutable structural snapshot from a descriptor.
member.param: The descriptor to snapshot while its Roslyn symbol is available.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeDeclarationSnapshot
member.summary: An immutable description of a named type declaration and its containing declarations.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeDeclarationSnapshot.Name
member.summary: The declared source name.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeDeclarationSnapshot.MetadataName
member.summary: The metadata name, including generic arity.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeDeclarationSnapshot.NamespaceName
member.summary: The containing namespace.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeDeclarationSnapshot.QualifiedName
member.summary: The source-qualified name within its containing types.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeDeclarationSnapshot.IdentityIdentifier
member.summary: A stable identifier suitable for generated member names.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeDeclarationSnapshot.Accessibility
member.summary: The C# accessibility keyword.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeDeclarationSnapshot.DeclarationKeyword
member.summary: The C# declaration keyword.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeDeclarationSnapshot.IsError
member.summary: Whether Roslyn resolved the declaration as an error type.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeDeclarationSnapshot.ContainingTypes
member.summary: The containing type declarations, from outermost to innermost.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.ContainingTypeSnapshot
member.summary: An immutable description of a containing type declaration.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.ContainingTypeSnapshot.Name
member.summary: The declared type name.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.ContainingTypeSnapshot.Accessibility
member.summary: The C# accessibility keyword.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.ContainingTypeSnapshot.DeclarationKeyword
member.summary: The C# declaration keyword.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.PropertySnapshot
member.summary: An immutable, symbol-free property description.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.PropertySnapshot.#ctor(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a property snapshot.
member.param: The property type.
The non-empty property name.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.PropertySnapshot.Type
member.summary: The property type.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.PropertySnapshot.Name
member.summary: The property name.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.PropertySnapshot.Create(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.PropertyDescriptor)
member.summary: Creates a property snapshot from a descriptor.
member.param: The property descriptor to snapshot.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.PropertyPathSnapshot
member.summary: An immutable, non-empty path of properties.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.PropertyPathSnapshot.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.PropertySnapshot})
member.summary: Creates a property path.
member.param: The non-null properties, ordered from root to leaf.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.PropertyPathSnapshot.Properties
member.summary: The properties ordered from root to leaf.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.PropertyPathSnapshot.PropertyType
member.summary: The leaf property.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.PropertyPathSnapshot.Path
member.summary: The dot-separated property path.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.AssignmentSnapshot
member.summary: An immutable description of an assignment selected during property matching.
Creates an assignment snapshot.
member.param: The assignment strategy.
The collection materialization strategy.
The nested property selection, when required.
The element assignment for a select operation, when required.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.AssignmentSnapshot.AssignType
member.summary: The assignment strategy.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.AssignmentSnapshot.Materialization
member.summary: The collection materialization strategy.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.AssignmentSnapshot.RequireToList
member.summary: Whether the generated assignment must materialize a list.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.AssignmentSnapshot.InnerSelection
member.summary: The nested property selection, when required.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.AssignmentSnapshot.ElementAssignment
member.summary: For , how each element must be assigned. See .

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.PropertyMatchSnapshot
member.summary: An immutable match between an origin property and an optional target path.
Creates a property match snapshot.
member.param: The non-null origin property.
The matched target path, when found.
The assignment strategy, when required.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.PropertyMatchSnapshot.Origin
member.summary: The origin property.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.PropertyMatchSnapshot.Target
member.summary: The matched target path, when found.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.PropertyMatchSnapshot.Assignment
member.summary: The assignment strategy, when required.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.MatchSelectionSnapshot
member.summary: An immutable, symbol-free snapshot of a complete property matching result.
Creates a matching result snapshot.
member.param: The origin type.
The target type.
The property matches.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.MatchSelectionSnapshot.OriginType
member.summary: The origin type.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.MatchSelectionSnapshot.TargetType
member.summary: The target type.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.MatchSelectionSnapshot.PropertyMatches
member.summary: The frozen property matches.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeUsageRoles
member.summary: The contextual roles a type can play at a particular use site (a parameter, a service, ...). These are usage facts, not structural facts, so they never belong on the structural : the same type may play different roles at different sites.

member.name: F:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeUsageRoles.None
member.summary: No contextual role.

member.name: F:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeUsageRoles.Entity
member.summary: The type is a domain entity loaded by the handler.

member.name: F:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeUsageRoles.Context
member.summary: The type is the unit-of-work / persistence context.

member.name: F:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeUsageRoles.HandlerParameter
member.summary: The type is an externally-bound handler parameter (e.g. WithParameter).

member.name: F:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeUsageRoles.CollectionOfEntities
member.summary: The type is a collection of domain entities loaded by the handler.

summary.para: A symbol-free, value-equatable snapshot of a type as used at a specific site: the structural together with the contextual resolved for that site.
The roles are frozen here at transform time and never mutate the structural snapshot, so two uses of the same type that differ only by role produce different values while sharing an equal .

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeUsageSnapshot.#ctor(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeSnapshot,RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeUsageRoles)
member.summary: Creates a usage snapshot from a structural snapshot and its roles.
member.param: The immutable structural type snapshot.
The contextual roles resolved for this use site.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeUsageSnapshot.Type
member.summary: The structural snapshot of the type (never carries the role).

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeUsageSnapshot.Roles
member.summary: The contextual roles resolved for this use site.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeUsageSnapshot.IsEntity
member.summary: Whether the type is used as a domain entity here.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeUsageSnapshot.IsContext
member.summary: Whether the type is used as the persistence context here.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeUsageSnapshot.IsHandlerParameter
member.summary: Whether the type is used as an externally-bound handler parameter here.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeUsageSnapshot.IsCollectionOfEntities
member.summary: Whether the type is used as a collection of domain entities here.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeUsageSnapshot.Create(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.TypeDescriptor,RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeUsageRoles)
member.summary: Creates a usage snapshot from a descriptor and explicit roles.
member.param: The type descriptor to snapshot.
The contextual roles resolved for this use site.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.Snapshots.TypeUsageSnapshot.CreateFromHints(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.TypeDescriptor)
member.summary: Creates a usage snapshot from a descriptor, reading its mutable hints (IsEntity, IsContext, IsHandlerParameter, IsCollectionOfEntities) into frozen . Use this to cross the boundary from the working model to the pipeline.
member.param: The descriptor whose structural type and mutable role hints will be frozen.

summary.para: Describes a type during matching and code generation.

It implements because the matching logic compares types structurally (by name, namespaces and nullability — never by symbol). That equality is not a licence to use it in an incremental generator pipeline: it holds a (see ), which keeps the whole alive between builds, and its hints (see and friends) are mutable and excluded from equality.

For anything the pipeline retains, use
and pass the resulting snapshot along — it is immutable, symbol-free and has value equality.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.TypeDescriptor.NullableAnnotation
member.summary: The nullable annotation of the type reference, captured from the symbol when available. It is additional data: the is not modified by this annotation.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.TypeDescriptor.IsArray
member.summary: Whether the type is an array (T[]).

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.TypeDescriptor.IsEnumerable
member.summary: Whether the type is the enumerable interface itself (IEnumerable<T> or IEnumerable), and not merely a type implementing it. See for the latter.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.TypeDescriptor.IsCollection
member.summary: Whether the type is a collection, that is, an array or any type implementing IEnumerable<T> (including IEnumerable<T> itself). Strings are not considered collections.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.TypeDescriptor.GenericType
member.summary: Get the generic type name if the type is generic, otherwise returns the type name itself.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.TypeDescriptor.GetGenericTypes
member.summary: Gets all generic type names or empty if it is not a generic type.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Descriptors.TypeDescriptor.IsGenericType
member.summary: Checks if the type is a generic type. A generic type is defined as one that contains < and >

summary.para: An immutable, symbol-free and value-equatable description of a diagnostic, safe to retain in an incremental generator pipeline. It stores the diagnostic id, its arguments as strings and the location decomposed into file path, source span and line span.

The pipeline carries this DTO; the and are reconstructed only at RegisterSourceOutput via , whose resolver maps an id back to its . The catalog of descriptors belongs to the consuming generator, so this type does not reference any specific catalog.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Diagnostics.DiagnosticInfo.Id
member.summary: The diagnostic id (e.g. RCCMD026).

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Diagnostics.DiagnosticInfo.Arguments
member.summary: The message arguments, already reduced to strings.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Diagnostics.DiagnosticInfo.FilePath
member.summary: The source file path, or when there is no in-source location.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Diagnostics.DiagnosticInfo.SourceSpan
member.summary: The source span of the location.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Diagnostics.DiagnosticInfo.LineSpan
member.summary: The line/character span of the location.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Diagnostics.DiagnosticInfo.HasLocation
member.summary: Whether an in-source location was captured.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Diagnostics.DiagnosticInfo.Create(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.DiagnosticDescriptor,Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.Location,System.Object[])
member.summary: Creates a from a descriptor, an optional location and message arguments. The location is decomposed into equatable parts; when it is not in source it is dropped.
member.param: The diagnostic descriptor whose id identifies the diagnostic.
The optional source location to decompose.
The values used to format the diagnostic message.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Diagnostics.DiagnosticInfo.ToDiagnostic(System.Func{System.String,Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.DiagnosticDescriptor})
member.summary: Reconstructs the . The maps this diagnostic's back to its ; the catalog is owned by the consuming generator, so this type never depends on a specific catalog.
member.param: Resolves a diagnostic id to the consuming generator's descriptor.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.ExtensionMethods.SplitUpperCase(System.String)
member.summary: Splits pascal case, so "FooBar" would become [ "Foo", "Bar" ].
member.param: A string, thats represents a name of something, to be splited.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.ExtensionMethods.TryGetEnumerableGenericType(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.ITypeSymbol,Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.ITypeSymbol@)
member.summary: Attempts to get the generic argument type of an -like type.
member.param: The symbol to inspect.
The generic type argument T.
member.returns: Returns true if the symbol represents or implements , otherwise false.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.ExtensionMethods.IsEnumerableInterface(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.ITypeSymbol)
member.summary: Determines whether the symbol is the interface itself (or the non generic ), and not merely a type implementing it.
member.param: The symbol to inspect.
member.returns: Returns true when the symbol is the enumerable interface itself.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.ExtensionMethods.TryReadStringValue(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.Syntax.ExpressionSyntax,System.String@)

summary.para: Attempts to extract a string value from the specified expression syntax node.

member.remarks: This method supports string literal expressions and 'nameof' invocations with a single argument. For unsupported expression types, the method returns false and sets to an empty string.
member.param: The expression syntax node to analyze for a string value. Supported expressions include string literals and 'nameof' invocations.
When this method returns , contains the extracted string value; otherwise, contains an empty string.
member.returns: true if a string value was successfully extracted from the expression; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.GeneratedHintName
member.summary: Creates deterministic, collision-resistant source hint names with a bounded, readable prefix.

remarks.para: The returned name has the format {readable-name}.{hash}.g.cs. The readable portion is sanitized and limited to 32 characters. The hash contains the first 40 bits of the SHA-256 digest of the complete identity, encoded as exactly eight file-name-safe Base32 characters.
Callers are responsible for building an identity that contains every component required for uniqueness, such as namespace, containing types, metadata name, generated type and artifact category.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.GeneratedHintName.Create(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a deterministic source hint name from a complete identity and a human-readable name.
member.param: The complete, stable identity of the generated artifact. It is used only to compute the hash.
The readable portion placed at the beginning of the file name. Non-alphanumeric characters other than _ and - are replaced with _, and the result is limited to 32 characters.
member.returns: A deterministic hint name ending in .g.cs.
member.exception: Thrown when or is null, empty or whitespace.

summary.para: A value-equatable transport for the result of a transform: an optional model plus the diagnostics produced while analysing the input. It keeps invalid input from reaching emitters or aggregations.

When is there is no to emit. Diagnostics may explain a semantic rejection, but an empty collection is also valid for input that is incomplete or not applicable and should be ignored without noise. This lets a single semantic read validate and collect diagnostics without a second analysis pass and without letting a broken model flow downstream.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Generation.GenerationCandidate`1.Model
member.summary: The model to emit, or when the input was invalid.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Generation.GenerationCandidate`1.Diagnostics
member.summary: The diagnostics gathered during analysis; may be present even for a valid model (warnings).

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Generation.GenerationCandidate`1.IsValid
member.summary: Whether a model is present and may drive generation.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Generation.GenerationCandidate`1.Valid(`0,RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Collections.EquatableArray{RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Diagnostics.DiagnosticInfo})
member.summary: Creates a valid candidate carrying a model and optional diagnostics.
member.param: The model that may flow to emitters.
Optional warnings or informational diagnostics associated with the model.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Generation.GenerationCandidate`1.Invalid(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Collections.EquatableArray{RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Diagnostics.DiagnosticInfo})
member.summary: Creates a candidate with no model. Diagnostics may explain a rejection; an empty collection represents incomplete or non-applicable input that should not emit a model or diagnostic.
member.param: The diagnostics to report, or an empty collection for a silent rejection.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Generation.GenerationCandidate`1.Invalid(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Diagnostics.DiagnosticInfo)
member.summary: Creates an invalid candidate from a single diagnostic.
member.param: The non-null diagnostic that explains the rejection.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Generation.GenerationCandidate`1.op_Equality(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Generation.GenerationCandidate{`0},RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Generation.GenerationCandidate{`0})
member.summary: Determines whether two candidates carry equal models and diagnostics.
member.param: The first candidate.
The second candidate.
member.returns: when models and diagnostics are equal.

member.name: M:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Generation.GenerationCandidate`1.op_Inequality(RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Generation.GenerationCandidate{`0},RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Generation.GenerationCandidate{`0})
member.summary: Determines whether two candidates differ by model or diagnostics.
member.param: The first candidate.
The second candidate.

summary.para: Represents a generator for creating C# class definitions, including support for namespaces, attributes, modifiers, generics, hierarchy, and members such as fields, constructors, properties, and methods.
This class provides functionality to construct and generate source code for a C# class dynamically.
It implements , which causes this node to generate a .cs file of the class, using the nodes added to the class.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Generators.ClassGenerator.ContainingTypes
member.summary: Gets the containing type declarations, ordered from the outermost type to the type that directly contains this generated class.

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Generators.ClassGenerator.FileName
member.summary: Nome do arquivo que será gerado, opcional, será utilizado o padrão: "{Name}.g.cs".

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Generators.ContainingTypeGenerator
member.summary: Represents a partial type declaration that contains a class generated by .

summary.para: Represents a node for code generation.

A node can be a class, namespace, property, method, command, etc.
A node is a complete piece of code. For divisions in snippets, there is the .

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Generators.ITransformationGenerator

summary.para: Defines a contract for generating transformations within a source production context.

member.remarks: Implementations of this interface are responsible for producing transformations or outputs based on the provided . This is typically used in source generators to contribute additional code or artifacts during compilation.

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Generators.ITransformationGenerator`1

summary.para: Defines a contract for generating transformations within a source production context.

member.remarks: Implementations of this interface are responsible for producing transformations or outputs based on the provided . This is typically used in source generators to contribute additional code or artifacts during compilation.
member.typeparam: Type of models used to generate sources

member.name: P:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Generators.PocoGenerator.FileName
member.summary: Nome do arquivo que será gerado, opcional, será utilizado o padrão: "{Name}.g.cs".

member.name: T:RoyalCode.Extensions.SourceGenerator.Generators.ValueNode
member.summary: Represents an abstract base class for nodes that encapsulate a value.
member.remarks: The class provides a common interface for derived classes that represent specific types of values. It supports implicit conversion from and to their respective derived types.
